note: Machine-readable mirror of the harness-tuning-roadmap pattern table. Excludes rows 12, 13, 21, 36, 43-47 which are NEG/NOTE/unallocated. When a pattern row has been re-run with a sensitivity variant (e.g. P56 v1 vs v2), the variant carries an _v2 suffix on the id field. Verdicts here are the directional verdict (planner-prompt-relevant); the point-estimate verdict is preserved in the markdown roadmap only. When a row is ambiguous, verdict_kind is "unknown".

patterns.name: Length
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` `targetWords` band guidance
patterns.notes: PASS — variant validated on probe

patterns.name: Beat kind distribution
patterns.harness_target: `beat-expansion-system.md` kind-balance soft prior
patterns.notes: PASS — full ranking matches all 3 books (action > dialogue > interiority > description). Ship as directional ranking prior.

patterns.name: Opener kind modal
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` opener guidance
patterns.notes: PASS_MODAL_ONLY — description-as-modal-opener stable; secondary ordering varies. Ship as modal-class prior.

patterns.name: Closer kind modal
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` closer guidance
patterns.notes: PASS_MODAL_ONLY corpus; VARIANT REGRESSION — revise plotter prompt to make "closer beat is action-kind" an explicit prior, then re-probe.

patterns.name: Beat boundary signals
patterns.harness_target: `beat-expansion-system.md` transition vocabulary as soft prior — encode the top-4 set, not a single dominant signal
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — top-4 vocabulary stable; specific rank order is not. Soften variant from rank-ordered to set-based.

patterns.name: Tension curve / pacing rhythm
patterns.harness_target: `beat-expansion-system.md` + `chapter-outline-system.md` chapter-position pacing guidance
patterns.notes: PASS — book-level position-aware action density. Ship.

patterns.name: Character introduction pacing
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` per-chapter new-character budget
patterns.notes: PASS — directional curve matches all 3 books.

patterns.name: POV rotation
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` POV-character guidance — current planner says "Protagonist should hold POV for most chapters; rotate only when a different perspective is load-bearing." Salvatore data argues for more permissive rotation.
patterns.notes: PASS — high-frequency rotation reproduces.

patterns.name: Setting-change frequency
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` permissive multi-location guidance
patterns.notes: PASS_WITH_CONTENT_CONDITIONALS — ship the permissive prior; note the dungeon-crawl exception class.

patterns.name: Forward-hook taxonomy
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` `purpose` guidance — describe the hook *kind* per chapter, default to partial-resolution
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate

patterns.name: Time-cut markers
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` purpose guidance — content-type-conditional time-cut budget; or beat-expansion guidance to use within-chapter time-cuts as a structural device
patterns.notes: PASS_CONTENT_CONDITIONAL — within-chapter cuts are the consistent shape; cross-chapter rate is content-type dependent

patterns.name: Established-facts density
patterns.harness_target: Either RELAX existing planner floor `establishedFacts.length ≥ 6` to ≥4-5, or KEEP as aspirational
patterns.notes: DECISION_PENDING — corpus-v1 variant may be over-trimming facts; investigate prompt vs. policy interaction

patterns.name: Chapter-opener rhetorical shape
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` opener guidance — add per-chapter `openerKind` enum; default to scene-set-description with permitted alternates
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate

patterns.name: Per-chapter primary conflict type
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` `purpose` guidance — soft-target rotation ~55% over a moving window; flag streaks ≥6 outside designated set-pieces; do NOT ban 3+ streaks. Orthogonal to mice (complementary chapter-axis).
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate, with corpus-validated counter-finding

patterns.name: Per-chapter dramatic question resolution shape
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` `purpose` field — note resolution-shape prior 55/20/10/10/5; explicitly call out `replaced` (deliberate misdirection) and `compound` (multi-faction) as structural choices, not bugs
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate, complements Pattern 14 not duplicates it

patterns.name: Stake-escalation curve
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` `purpose` guidance — within-chapter "stakes escalate from open to close" + arc-level "later chapters carry denser stakes events"
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate, BOTH axes directionally stable

patterns.name: Char-pair scene density
patterns.harness_target: `beat-expansion-system.md` ensemble-size soft prior — bias to solo+duo beats
patterns.notes: PASS — ship as planner prior

patterns.name: POV duration
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` POV guidance — allow 2–3 POV slots per chapter; lead character ~25–30%
patterns.notes: PASS — refines P10; ship

patterns.name: Setting-recurrence pattern
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` `setting` guidance — late-third new-setting fraction 35–65% (vs 80–95% early); climax should preferentially happen at anchors established 5–15 chapters earlier, never fresh locales
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate, refines P11

patterns.name: Antagonist on-page rate
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` `purpose` guidance — antagonist beat-fraction prior 20–30%, late/early ratio ≥ 1.4, soft prior chapter-end ~30% antagonist presence
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate

patterns.name: Chapter-title shape taxonomy
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` `titleShape` enum — primary single-shape default to {metaphorical-image, place-name}; OPTIONAL `secondary_shape` field; lead compositional fewshots with place+concept
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — top-2 stable; NEW

patterns.name: Try/fail cycle structure
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` — ship rising-stakes-density across try-streaks + late-third try-rate elevation. Do NOT ship fixed try-rate-percentage prior or final-streak-at-end prior.
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — directional patterns ship; rate-prior does NOT

patterns.name: Setup-to-payoff distance
patterns.harness_target: `beat-expansion-system.md` foreshadow guidance — "when planting something material, payoff should land within 1–3 chapters; corpus median 1 chapter; reserve 10+ chapter setups for series-arc threads (~15%)"
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate

patterns.name: Sentence + paragraph length
patterns.harness_target: Writer-prompt sentence-rhythm prior + paragraph HOLD
patterns.notes: PASS sentence; HOLD paragraph

patterns.name: Dialogue ratio within beats
patterns.harness_target: Writer-prompt density target + post-write fraction check (fire if dialogue-kind beat <0.25 or >0.75 dialogue-mass)
patterns.notes: PASS — ship writer + checker prior

patterns.name: Beat-cluster sequence patterns
patterns.harness_target: `beat-expansion-system.md` sequence guidance — encourage same-kind clusters; treat interiority/description as transition beats
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate

patterns.name: Chapter-seam transition shape
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` chapter-seam coherence soft prior — encode positive rules as preference shifts, negative rules as ranking-down constraints
patterns.notes: PASS for the 3 stable +/- rules; aggregate outlier rejected as CS-only

patterns.name: Conflict resolution latency
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` `purpose` guidance — `transitioned` rare (~4%, do not default); modal is `paused`; combat-thread chapters more likely to close at boundary, relationship-thread chapters stay open
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — structural patterns ship; resolved-rate prior does NOT

patterns.name: Sentence length by beat-kind
patterns.harness_target: Writer-prompt per-kind sentence-length budgets in `beat-writer-system.md`
patterns.notes: PASS writer-prompt prior

patterns.name: Action verb lexicon
patterns.harness_target: Writer-prompt vocabulary prior — top-15 verbs as preferred action lexicon (fewshot block under both Salvatore-LoRA and DeepSeek routes)
patterns.notes: PASS — ship writer fewshot

patterns.name: Adverb density
patterns.harness_target: Lint-layer flag at >4.0/100w; do NOT prescribe per-kind writer prior
patterns.notes: PASS lint constraint only

patterns.name: Interiority marker density
patterns.harness_target: Planner: ~20% beats interiority kind. Writer: ~1.4 markers/100w on interiority beats, ~0.8/100w baseline. Encourage state-of-knowledge ("X knew Y")
patterns.notes: PASS — ship planner + writer prior

patterns.name: Quotation density + exchange shape
patterns.harness_target: Writer-prompt: dialogue-kind beats target 4–7 chunks/beat, median chunk ~5–6w, p90 ≤25w. Deterministic post-write lint: fire if <2 chunks OR any chunk >60w OR mean chunk >18w. Complementary to P30.
patterns.notes: PASS — ship writer + lint prior

patterns.name: Beat-to-summary expansion ratio
patterns.harness_target: `beat-expansion-system.md` prompt copy update from "~100w/beat" to "~110–130w" (current implicit 4.5× target is ~15% low vs corpus 5.19×). Do NOT differentiate targetWords by kind.
patterns.notes: PASS — ship planner-prompt copy update

patterns.name: Time-of-day + weather distribution
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` `setting` defaults — `time-of-day = night, weather = wind`; setting cues on scene-opening beats only, not every beat
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate

patterns.name: Sentence-opener distribution
patterns.harness_target: Writer-prompt per-kind opener-mix priors + 4 deterministic lint targets (participial-first >5%, subject-first floor <35%, interiority conjunction-opener floor <5%, dialogue-first dominance <40% on dialogue-kind beats)
patterns.notes: PASS — ship writer + lint priors; cross-corpus value flagged for future Howard/Cook/Tolkien comparisons

patterns.name: Per-character dialogue mass
patterns.harness_target: New schema concept: leading dialogue speaker rotates with **plot ownership, not POV**. Add OPTIONAL `chapterPlotOwner` field on chapter outlines (default = `charactersPresent[0]`); writer targets ~30–35% dialogue share for plot-owner
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate, introduces new harness concept

patterns.name: Cross-chapter callback density
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` per-quartile callback density target: q1 1–2 / q2 3–5 / q3 7–10 / q4 10–15 distinct prior-chapter entity references per 1k words. Lever is named-entity reuse, NOT explicit time-progression markers. Pairs with P28 (plant + payoff close) + P14 (forward-h
patterns.notes: PASS — strong NEW ship candidate

patterns.name: Punctuation patterns
patterns.harness_target: Lint rules gated to `WRITER_GENRE_PACKS` fantasy-Salvatore: `lint.ellipsis_outside_dialogue`, `lint.parenthetical_present`, `lint.em_dash_in_action`. Writer prompt: ellipsis-only-in-dialogue, parenthetical-ban, em-dash density target by kind.
patterns.notes: PASS — ship lint + writer prior

patterns.name: Dialogue-tag distribution
patterns.harness_target: Writer prompt (Salvatore-cluster fantasy): said-ratio ~25–30% said + ~30–40% asked/replied/answered + ~15–25% flavored. Lint rule `lint.said_ratio_floor_violated` (>0.55 = too Howard-like) + `lint.same_alt_tag_repeated_in_beat`. Per-character archetype priors (gruff = more flavor
patterns.notes: PASS — ship writer + lint prior; archetype layer NEW concept

patterns.name: Chapter-opener hook taxonomy
patterns.harness_target: Chapter-skeleton schema: optional `openerKind` enum (8 buckets). `beat-expansion-system.md` quantitative prior matching corpus modal. Genre-gate via `WRITER_GENRE_PACKS` (Salvatore-cluster fantasy only).
patterns.notes: PASS — ship planner-prior + schema field

patterns.name: Chapter-closer hook taxonomy
patterns.harness_target: `chapter-outline-system.md` `purpose` field — closer-beat rhetorical-shape prior; default to modal class with permitted alternates from the always-present set; orthogonal to Pattern 17 (opener) and complementary to Pattern 14 (forward-hook scene-level)
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — modal-class or top-3-set ships; specific ranking does not

patterns.name: Scene-break density + within-chapter scene cadence
patterns.harness_target: Add OPTIONAL `chapterShape: continuous|fragmented` + `sceneCount?` fields on chapterOutlineSchema (planner Phase 1 skeleton). Default `fragmented` mode=4, range 2-5. Continuous-rate prior ~10-15% of chapters (CS+HG cluster); SoS-style is opt-in. Lint: mid-chapter white-space-brea
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — ship planner schema additions with CS+HG defaults; SoS continuous-chapter mode as opt-in lever

patterns.name: POV distribution per book
patterns.harness_target: Schema: `chapterOutlineSchema.povCharacters: string[]` (not singular). Constrain to fellowship + villain rotation. POV-run-length prior 1.0-1.6 chapters. **Permit `pov: 'external_omniscient'`**. **Remove any rule banning mid-chapter POV shifts** — corpus-canonical.
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — ship modal-POV + cast constraint + run-length prior; multi-POV gate fails but the failure is the lever (multi-POV is norm, not exception)

patterns.name: Sensory mode distribution per beat-kind
patterns.harness_target: writer-prompt per-kind sensory-target priors (e.g. description→sight-dominant; dialogue→sound-dominant; action→touch-blend); optional lint rule: warn when top-1 sense for kind is absent in beat
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — ship top-1 sense per kind as soft writer-prompt prior; defer rank-2 ordering

patterns.name: Time-skip / temporal-leap marker distribution
patterns.harness_target: Planner prior: chapter-outline-system.md transition/seam — time-skip cues belong at chapter-CLOSE descriptions (or scene-bounded opens), not chapter-opens. Writer fewshot (Salvatore route): signature subset `many years` + `that night` + `at dawn` + `long before` + `the next day`
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — structural position ships (boundary>internal 3/3); density+top3 drift, ship lexicon as fewshot subset not fixed shortlist; explicitly reject `chapter-open as time-skip site` framing

patterns.name: Past-perfect ("had X-ed") density distribution
patterns.harness_target: Writer-prompt per-kind density priors via `WRITER_GENRE_PACKS` (interiority 1.7–2.1, dialogue 0.6–0.7 / 100w; interiority:dialogue ratio ~3×). Chapter-CLOSE narrator-recap planner prior (close-beat purpose field — pair with P54 time-skip cluster + P50 reflection-pause). REJECT ch
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — kind-ordering ships 3/3 (interiority leads); chapter-CLOSE recap site ships 3/3 (NOT chapter-open as hypothesized); P54 co-pair ships 3/3; density spread fails 30% gate (43%, ship as soft prior not hard floor)

patterns.name: Body-part vocabulary distribution (implicit camera anchor)
patterns.harness_target: writer-prompt per-kind body-part priors (camera-anchor: action->hands_arms / feet; dialogue->head_face/eyes/lips; interiority->internal_visceral+head_face; description->lower density), plus optional per-beat density floor for intimate close-third scenes (~corpus median p50)
patterns.notes: HOLD — do not codify per-kind region ordering as a writer prior; revisit with finer beat-segmentation or per-character splits

patterns.name: Body-part vocabulary (v2 sensitivity — back/side removed from torso)
patterns.harness_target: writer-prompt per-kind body-part priors (camera-anchor: action->hands_arms / feet; dialogue->head_face/eyes/lips; interiority->internal_visceral+head_face; description->lower density), plus optional per-beat density floor for intimate close-third scenes (~corpus median p50)
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — ship top-1 region per kind as soft writer-prompt camera prior; defer rank-2/3 ordering and per-term shortlists

patterns.name: Pronoun + negation density per beat-kind
patterns.harness_target: Ship the stable signal as a writer-prompt prior (top-1 kind only); defer the unstable signal pending finer-grained analysis
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — ship stable signal as soft writer-prompt prior; defer unstable side

patterns.name: Italics / emphasis pattern usage
patterns.harness_target: **Re-ingest source PDFs/EPUBs preserving italic markers** (pdfminer.six or ebook-convert → HTML/styled-markdown → `*word*` canonical markers) → rerun Pattern 58. Then: writer-prompt per-kind italic-density prior (likely interiority > dialogue > action > description); internal-tho
patterns.notes: KILL — italics stripped during ingestion; signal unrecoverable until re-ingestion with italic preservation; ALL-CAPS fallback also unusable

patterns.name: Question-mark density per kind
patterns.harness_target: writer-prompt per-kind question-density target + question-type mix prior (e.g. dialogue questions skew wh+yesno; interiority skews wh-rhetorical); optional lint: warn when interiority beat has zero `?` for a tense scene; optional lint: dialogue-kind beat with consecutive 3+ `?`-s
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — ship the stable component(s); defer the components that miss the gate

patterns.name: Comma + clause-count per sentence
patterns.harness_target: writer-prompt per-kind comma-density + clauses-per-sentence rhythm priors (action=fewer commas/clauses, description=denser, interiority=mid-sentence conjunction-leaning); optional lint: warn when action-kind beats average comma density >= description-kind mean (rhythm collapse)
patterns.notes: PASS_PARTIAL — ship the stable axis (comma density or clauses-per-sentence ordering) as soft writer-prompt prior; defer the unstable axis
